service.name: vercel
service.description: Vercel API for managing deployments and projects

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of deployments to return (default 20)

params.name: state
params.description: Filter by state (BUILDING, ERROR, INITIALIZING, QUEUED, READY, CANCELED)

response.description: Paginated list of deployment objects with url, state, and created timestamp

intents.description: List all projects in the Vercel account

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of projects to return

response.description: Paginated list of project objects with name, framework, and latest deployments

intents.description: Get details of a specific Vercel project

response.description: Project object with name, framework, environment variables, and domains
